_comment: the control-plane, admin CLI, and MCP copies are exact mirrors of this SDK source.
Version 2 retires the fake runtime/template/canvas delegation catalog. Those artifacts are
owned by repository CI-on-merge. This endpoint owns only synchronous, immutable tenant-fleet rollout.

env.note: optional environment assertion: production or staging

components.note: empty, [all], or [tenant-fleet]; every other selector is rejected

dry_run.note: true validates and plans with zero mutation; response complete is false

confirm.note: required for every wet full-fleet rollout
